installConfigs.instructions: Replace <your-stripe-secret-or-restricted-key> with a Stripe secret key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...) or a restricted key from the Stripe Dashboard (https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys). A restricted key with only the permissions your agent needs is recommended for production use. The key is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'.
